category_sources: Official MapProxy homepage describes MapProxy as an open source proxy for geospatial data.
source_facts.description says MapProxy is an accelerating web map proxy.
display_name_sources: Official homepage and repository use the display name MapProxy.
docs_sources: Official GitHub repository states documentation is available at mapproxy.github.io/mapproxy/latest/.
source_facts.homepage is the official project site with a documentation path.
repo_sources: Official MapProxy development page identifies https://github.com/mapproxy/mapproxy as the main authoritative repository.
source_facts.repo is empty, so repository was determined from official MapProxy development information and official GitHub repository.
tags_sources: Official homepage describes caching, accelerating, and transforming data from map services for GIS clients.
source_facts.description identifies web map proxy functionality.
